zh.lifeSummary: 當Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny於1119年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷時，他的父親Nigel D'Aubigny48歲，母親Gundred de Gournay22歲。他於大約1134年與Mrs. Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny在英國英格蘭德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1203年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾享年84歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny于1119年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷时，他的父亲Nigel D'Aubigny48岁，母亲Gundred de Gournay22岁。他于大约1134年与Mrs. Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny在英国英格兰德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1203年在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾享年84岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bellers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bellairs
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of Bellars , suggesting French belle(s) aire(s) ‘lovely demeanor’.

variants.name: Bellars
meanings: (of Norman origin): apparently from Old French bélier ‘ram’, hence a nickname for someone thought to resemble a ram in some way or possibly a metonymic occupational name for a shepherd. In Northamptonshire the name attracts excrescent -s already by 1377.

nameMeanings.name: Hamon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Éamann
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Eamonn
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Eamon
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Éaman
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny was born in 1119, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, his father, Nigel D'Aubigny, was 48 and his mother, Gundred de Gournay, was 22. He married Mrs. Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny about 1134, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1203, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 84, and was buried in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny est né en 1119, à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Nigel D'Aubigny, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Gundred de Gournay, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny environ 1134, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1203, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat um 1134 in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs. Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1203 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny è nato il nel 1119 nel Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Nigel D'Aubigny, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Gundred de Gournay, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny circa 1134, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1203, nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hamon de Bellers d'Aubignyが1119年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイで生まれた時，父Nigel D'Aubignyは48歳，母Gundred de Gournayは22歳であった。約1134年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアでMrs. Hamon de Bellers d'Aubignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1203年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで84歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny(이)가 1119년 영국 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nigel D'Aubigny(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Gundred de Gournay(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1134년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 Mrs. Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1203년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny nasceu em 1119, em Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nigel D'Aubigny, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Gundred de Gournay, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny aproximadamente 1134, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1203, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny родился в 1119 г. в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nigel D'Aubigny было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Gundred de Gournay, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Hamon de Bellers d'Aubigny около 1134 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1203 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
